_comment: Parity fixtures for createRecipe. Each fixture has existing recipe rows plus the requested title. The expected value is the object returned by createRecipe(). Both adapters must reproduce `expected` exactly for every fixture.

input.recipes: Array of existing rows from the `recipes` table. Fields: ID, title, servings_default, servings_min, servings_max.
input.request: Object passed to createRecipe. Field: title.
input.supabaseAssignedId: The id returned by the mocked Supabase insert response.

schema.expected: Object with the new recipe id, per js/data/contracts/createRecipe.md.

fixtures.name: 01-empty-database
fixtures.description: Create one recipe when no recipes exist yet.

fixtures.name: 02-after-existing-recipes
fixtures.description: Create one recipe after existing recipes are already present.

fixtures.name: 03-trim-title
fixtures.description: Spaces at the start and end of the title are trimmed before saving.
